title: The Spleen Center — Instinct & Wellbeing
description: This center governs intuition, health & survival. Defined, it is a consistent source of that energy; open, it takes the world in and amplifies it — neither is better than the other.
learningGoal: The viewer understands what the Spleen center governs, and what it means for them when it is defined versus open — and feels recognised, not labelled.
keyPoints: This center governs intuition, health & survival.
When defined: You have a reliable immune system and strong survival instincts. Your intuition speaks once — trust it the first time.
When open: You're health-sensitive and highly intuitive about others' well-being. Be vigilant about boundaries around sickness and fear.
forbiddenClaims: a defined center is better, stronger, or more evolved than an open center
open centers are flaws or weaknesses to fix
you can or should change which of your centers are defined

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: The Spleen Center — Instinct & Wellbeing — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: The Spleen Center — Instinct & Wellbeing — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.hook: The Spleen Center — Instinct & Wellbeing — try this today.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: The Spleen Center — Instinct & Wellbeing — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: The Spleen Center — Instinct & Wellbeing — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: This center governs intuition, health & survival. Defined, it is a consistent source of that energy; open, it takes the world in and amplifies it — neither is better than the other.
